zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Burt於1655年11月5日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可雷亞丁時，她的父親James Burt33歲，母親Anna Lewis33歲。她於大約1676年與Joseph Hartshorn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1727年10月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可沃波爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Burt于1655年11月5日出生在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可雷亞丁时，她的父亲James Burt33岁，母亲Anna Lewis33岁。她于大约1676年与Joseph Hartshorn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1727年10月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可沃波爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Birt
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places in the Rhineland named Birth or Birten.
In some cases also Croatian: occupational name from birt ‘inn-keeper’, a regional or colloquial word of German origin (see Wirt ).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Burt was born on 5 November 1655, in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States, her father, James Burt, was 33 and her mother, Anna Lewis, was 33. She married Joseph Hartshorn about 1676, in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 22 October 1727, in Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Burt est née le 5 novembre 1655, à Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, James Burt, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anna Lewis, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Joseph Hartshorn environ 1676, à Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1727, à Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Burt am 5. November 1655 in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Burt 33 und ihre Mutter Anna Lewis 33. Sie hat um 1676 in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Joseph Hartshorn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1727 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Burt è nata il il 5 novembre 1655 nel Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, James Burt, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Anna Lewis, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Joseph Hartshorn circa 1676, nel Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1727, nel Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Burtが1655年11月5日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスレアディングで生まれた時，父James Burtは33歳，母Anna Lewisは33歳であった。約1676年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスレアディングでJoseph Hartshornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1727年10月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクワルポルで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Burt(이)가 1655년 11월 5일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 리딩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Burt(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Lewis(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1676년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩에서 Joseph Hartshorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1727년 10월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 월포일에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Burt nasceu em 5 de novembro de 1655, em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, James Burt, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anna Lewis, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Joseph Hartshorn aproximadamente 1676, em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1727, em Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Burt родилась 5 ноября 1655 г. в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени James Burt было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Lewis, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Hartshorn около 1676 г. в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 22 октября 1727 г. в местности валпол, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Burt nació el 5 de noviembre de 1655, en Reading, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, James Burt, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anna Lewis, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joseph Hartshorn aproximadamente 1676, en Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1727, en Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años.
